name: Land Securities Group PLC
description: Land Securities Group PLC, trading as Landsec, is the largest commercial property development and investment company in the United Kingdom. As a real estate investment trust (REIT), the company focuses on owning, developing, and managing a diverse portfolio of retail, leisure, workspace, and residential properties. Landsec is dedicated to creating sustainable, high-potential places that enhance the quality of life for those who live, work, and visit them. By curating and sustaining these spaces, the firm aims to create long-term value for its stakeholders while fostering meaningful connections within communities across the UK.
